hooks.prompt: Review the current git changes (run git diff) against project conventions: PascalCase for classes, camelCase for functions, I prefix for interfaces, $ suffix for observables, 2-space indent, JSDoc on public methods. Check for console.log leftovers, unused imports, missing cleanup (destroy/unsubscribe). Report issues as a checklist grouped by file. If no source code changes, say 'No source code changes to review'. Use $ARGUMENTS for context.
